hooks.prompt:
A file was just edited or created. Here is the tool event: $ARGUMENTS

Look at the file_path and the content/changes. Write a single-line changelog entry summarizing what changed, in this format:
`[YYYY-MM-DD] <file_path relative to project root>: <one-line summary>`

Append it as a new line to `/Users/wangdi/Documents/dev/run-plan/AGENT/changelog.md`. Create the file if it does not exist. Do not add any other text — just the one line.
